summaries.description: Saved research summaries generated by the LLM

published_versions.description: Array of { _id, public_id, title, created_at } for each published version of this summary

total_cost.description: Accumulated cost info from all LLM calls

published.description: Published summary records — each is a snapshot shared publicly. Never updated; a new record is created on each publish.

html.description: HTML content of the summary at publish time

summary_id.description: Reference to the parent summaries record

created_at.description: Timestamp when this version was published

index.description: Main page. Stage 1a extracts date range + selects collections. Stage 1b runs per-collection. Stage 2 generates the HTML summary.

files.description: Main page HTML — sidebar, input section, result header with save+publish buttons, status bar, details/results tabs, post-result actions
All styles including published versions section
Mustache pcard template for public feed
Full-page public view using {{{html}}} to render summary HTML

permissions.name: read_logs
permissions.description: Read browsing history logs from hiper.cards to analyze your research

permissions.name: read_marks
permissions.description: Read bookmarks and highlights from hiper.cards to analyze your saved items

permissions.name: ai_access
permissions.description: Use your LLM API keys to analyze browsing data and generate summaries

permissions.name: publish_summary
permissions.description: Publish your research summaries publicly so anyone with the link can view them

description: Browsing History Summarizer synthesizes websites you have visited or bookmarked (in hiper cards) into nice summaries
